topSignals.signal: TRPS gene identified as co-factor in hair loss beyond DHT - dermal papilla dysfunction explains finasteride failures
topSignals.impact: Validates multi-mechanism hair solutions and GHK-Cu serum development. Amplifica's AMP-601/303 targeting mesenchymal stem cells shows Phase 1 human trial success.
topSignals.source: r/tressless (400+ upvotes, Imperial College PhD research, Nature publications)

topSignals.signal: TRT complication stories fueling peptide alternative interest - 42M bedridden after 2 years TRT despite T levels 724 ng/dL
topSignals.impact: Growing consumer skepticism about hormone replacement creates demand for peptide-based recovery solutions (BPC-157, TB-500) without HPTA shutdown.

topSignals.signal: Neurodegeneration reframed as systemic metabolic dysfunction by new startup - upstream prevention focus
topSignals.impact: Positions mitochondrial peptides (MOTS-c, Humanin) as preventive interventions vs. treating symptoms. Longevity market education opportunity.

topSignals.signal: USA Peptides diversifying into PGx testing with $299.99 + $5/month subscription model
topSignals.impact: Competitor creating recurring revenue and data moat. Signals subscription model viability in peptide industry. Consider peptide protocol subscriptions ($29-49/month).

topSignals.signal: Premium peptide pricing validated - FOXO4-DRI senolytic at $199.99 (USA Peptides highest price point)
topSignals.impact: Opportunity to expand into premium longevity category with high-margin products. Three-tier pricing strategy could increase AOV from $85 to $140.
